71_att: I learned that despite having the "best" or most expert individuals in a team, they can still make the wrong decision through small psychological causes such as groupthink, selective or biased data observation, and individuals within the group rephrasing the situation in a way that influences others to pursue the idea despite the data creating an uncertain conclusion that should very obviously not be pursued.
